channel.title: Autoweb Feather Improvements
channel.description: Autonomous improvements to the Feather web application

item.title: Add deploy.sh to prevent ETXTBSY errors — rm -f binary before cargo build (process keeps fd), with backup/revert/health-
item.description: Add deploy.sh to prevent ETXTBSY errors — rm -f binary before cargo build (process keeps fd), with backup/revert/health-check logic (132 tests pass)

item.title: Handle trailing JSONL parse errors gracefully — trim incomplete last lines before parsing (no-newline detection via rfin
item.description: Handle trailing JSONL parse errors gracefully — trim incomplete last lines before parsing (no-newline detection via rfind), log mid-file parse errors with line number + content preview for debugging (131 tests pass)

item.title: SSE tail dedup — sent_lines HashMap tracks UUID+content, skips re-emitting unchanged messages on normalized file rewrite
item.description: SSE tail dedup — sent_lines HashMap tracks UUID+content, skips re-emitting unchanged messages on normalized file rewrite, reducing resync bandwidth and frontend work (130 tests pass)

item.title: Fix SSE message ordering (HIGH) — add role tiebreaker to normalizer sort (user before assistant when timestamps equal) +
item.description: Fix SSE message ordering (HIGH) — add role tiebreaker to normalizer sort (user before assistant when timestamps equal) + frontend defensive event sort, preventing user messages appearing below assistant responses (129 tests pass)

item.title: Fix SSE resync flash — updateAssistantMessage now skips DOM update when content unchanged (data-raw-content comparison),
item.description: Fix SSE resync flash — updateAssistantMessage now skips DOM update when content unchanged (data-raw-content comparison), preventing expensive markdown re-render + syntax highlighting on reconnect (128 tests pass)

item.title: Add session draft persistence — input text saved when switching sessions, restored on return, cleared on send/Escape (12
item.description: Add session draft persistence — input text saved when switching sessions, restored on return, cleared on send/Escape (126 tests pass)

item.title: Add T keyboard shortcut to toggle thinking blocks — collapses/expands all thinking blocks, added to shortcuts modal and
item.description: Add T keyboard shortcut to toggle thinking blocks — collapses/expands all thinking blocks, added to shortcuts modal and command palette (125 tests pass)

item.title: Add message counts to date separators — day dividers now show user+assistant count (e.g. Today (23)) for quick volume ov
item.description: Add message counts to date separators — day dividers now show user+assistant count (e.g. Today (23)) for quick volume overview in long sessions (124 tests pass)

item.title: Add scroll position memory per session — saves scrollTop when switching away, restores when returning so users don't los
item.description: Add scroll position memory per session — saves scrollTop when switching away, restores when returning so users don't lose their place in long sessions (123 tests pass)

item.title: Add session count badges to sidebar time group headers — STARRED 1, TODAY 4, THIS WEEK 12 etc. shown next to group label
item.description: Add session count badges to sidebar time group headers — STARRED 1, TODAY 4, THIS WEEK 12 etc. shown next to group labels for quick volume overview (122 tests pass)

item.title: Add Ctrl+Home/Ctrl+End keyboard shortcuts to jump to first/last message — standard alternatives to vim gg/G, added to sh
item.description: Add Ctrl+Home/Ctrl+End keyboard shortcuts to jump to first/last message — standard alternatives to vim gg/G, added to shortcuts modal and command palette (121 tests pass)

item.title: Add 5 API contract tests (health, projects, sessions, history, session-ID validation) for test diversity — validates JSO
item.description: Add 5 API contract tests (health, projects, sessions, history, session-ID validation) for test diversity — validates JSON structure, field types, and ID rejection (120 tests pass)

item.title: Add quote-reply button on assistant messages — hover reveals Quote button (top-right, left of Copy) that excerpts first
item.description: Add quote-reply button on assistant messages — hover reveals Quote button (top-right, left of Copy) that excerpts first 5 lines as blockquote into input area, with mobile always-visible at 0.6 opacity (115 tests pass)

item.title: Add double-click to rename on desktop session header — cursor-pointer + ondblclick on title span, renameCurrentSession()
item.description: Add double-click to rename on desktop session header — cursor-pointer + ondblclick on title span, renameCurrentSession() helper, desktop header text update after rename (114 tests pass)

item.title: Add focus mode (F key) — eye icon button and keyboard shortcut to hide all tool calls/thinking blocks for clean conversa
item.description: Add focus mode (F key) — eye icon button and keyboard shortcut to hide all tool calls/thinking blocks for clean conversation reading, with data-msg-type attributes on all message types, command palette and shortcuts modal entries (113 tests pass)

item.title: Add message position indicator (42/155) when scrolling long sessions — floating monospace badge in top-right showing cur
item.description: Add message position indicator (42/155) when scrolling long sessions — floating monospace badge in top-right showing current message out of total, auto-hides after 1.5s, only for 10+ message sessions (112 tests pass)

item.title: Add hide session feature — right-click context menu Hide option (red danger styling), localStorage-backed hiddenSessions
item.description: Add hide session feature — right-click context menu Hide option (red danger styling), localStorage-backed hiddenSessions set, N hidden show-all bar in sidebar, command palette entries for hide/unhide, unhideAllSessions (111 tests pass)

item.title: Add zen mode (Z key) — hides sidebar, toolbar, and terminal for distraction-free reading with floating exit button, comm
item.description: Add zen mode (Z key) — hides sidebar, toolbar, and terminal for distraction-free reading with floating exit button, command palette entry, and shortcuts modal (110 tests pass)

item.title: Add G/gg vim-style jump to first/last message — G jumps to last message, gg (double-tap) to first, with command palette
item.description: Add G/gg vim-style jump to first/last message — G jumps to last message, gg (double-tap) to first, with command palette entries and shortcuts modal (109 tests pass)

item.title: Add typing indicator — animated bouncing dots appear below messages when assistant is working (status=working), hidden o
item.description: Add typing indicator — animated bouncing dots appear below messages when assistant is working (status=working), hidden on idle; 3-dot bounce animation with staggered delays (108 tests pass)

item.title: Add mark-all-read button — unread count below filter pills with one-click clear, command palette entry, dynamically show
item.description: Add mark-all-read button — unread count below filter pills with one-click clear, command palette entry, dynamically shown/hidden (107 tests pass)

item.title: Add keyboard shortcut hints (/, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+N, ?) to empty state for discoverability — styled kbd badges below suggesti
item.description: Add keyboard shortcut hints (/, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+N, ?) to empty state for discoverability — styled kbd badges below suggestion buttons (106 tests pass)

item.title: Add desktop session header bar — shows session title, message count, and relative time on md+ screens when viewing a ses
item.description: Add desktop session header bar — shows session title, message count, and relative time on md+ screens when viewing a session; especially useful when sidebar is hidden via Ctrl+B (105 tests pass)

item.title: Add lightbox click handlers to markdown images — cursor:pointer + onclick openLightbox in renderMarkdown so inline image
item.description: Add lightbox click handlers to markdown images — cursor:pointer + onclick openLightbox in renderMarkdown so inline images in assistant responses open full-size viewer on click (104 tests pass)

item.title: Add J/K vim-style message navigation — press J (next) or K (previous) to jump between messages with flash highlight, sho
item.description: Add J/K vim-style message navigation — press J (next) or K (previous) to jump between messages with flash highlight, shortcuts modal and command palette entries, session-switch reset (103 tests pass)

item.title: Add scroll progress indicator — thin gold bar at top of messages area showing scroll position in long sessions, hidden a
item.description: Add scroll progress indicator — thin gold bar at top of messages area showing scroll position in long sessions, hidden at top/bottom (102 tests pass)

item.title: Add session rename via right-click context menu and command palette — localStorage-backed custom titles with getSessionT
item.description: Add session rename via right-click context menu and command palette — localStorage-backed custom titles with getSessionTitle() helper, pencil icon in context menu, empty input resets to original (101 tests pass)

item.title: Add edit & resend button on user messages — hover reveals Edit (pencil icon) next to Copy on user bubbles, loads text in
item.description: Add edit & resend button on user messages — hover reveals Edit (pencil icon) next to Copy on user bubbles, loads text into input for editing and resending, mobile always-visible (100 tests pass)

item.title: Auto-collapse long code blocks (>25 lines) with gradient fade and Show N more lines / Collapse toggle button — improves
item.description: Auto-collapse long code blocks (>25 lines) with gradient fade and Show N more lines / Collapse toggle button — improves readability in code-heavy sessions (99 tests pass)

item.title: Add drag-to-resize sidebar width — 6px handle on right edge with gold accent, 200-500px clamped range, localStorage pers
item.description: Add drag-to-resize sidebar width — 6px handle on right edge with gold accent, 200-500px clamped range, localStorage persistence, double-click to reset default (98 tests pass)

item.title: Add wrap/unwrap toggle button on code blocks with long lines (>80 chars) — hover reveals Wrap button next to Copy, toggl
item.description: Add wrap/unwrap toggle button on code blocks with long lines (>80 chars) — hover reveals Wrap button next to Copy, toggles pre-wrap with active state highlight, mobile always-visible (97 tests pass)

item.title: Add session sort button — cycle between Latest, Most msgs, Oldest sort order in sidebar with localStorage persistence, c
item.description: Add session sort button — cycle between Latest, Most msgs, Oldest sort order in sidebar with localStorage persistence, command palette integration (96 tests pass)

item.title: Add line number gutter to code blocks (3+ lines) — positioned left gutter with border separator, auto-skips short snippe
item.description: Add line number gutter to code blocks (3+ lines) — positioned left gutter with border separator, auto-skips short snippets, integrates with existing copy button flow (95 tests pass)

item.title: Add Ctrl+Shift+C (Cmd+Shift+C) keyboard shortcut to copy last assistant message — copies raw markdown to clipboard with
item.description: Add Ctrl+Shift+C (Cmd+Shift+C) keyboard shortcut to copy last assistant message — copies raw markdown to clipboard with toast feedback, added to command palette and shortcuts help modal (94 tests pass)

item.title: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for sid
item.description: Add 'Open in new tab' to session context menu — right-click sessions to open in new browser tab via hash routing for side-by-side comparison (93 tests pass)

item.title: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket
item.description: Add character count indicator to message input — shows char count while typing, gold highlight at 500+ chars (WebSocket threshold), compact 2.5k format for 1000+ chars (92 tests pass)

item.title: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request
item.description: Add desktop notifications when assistant finishes while tab is in background — Notification API with permission request on first send, working->idle transition trigger, command palette toggle, localStorage persistence (91 tests pass)

item.title: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw outp
item.description: Add copy button to tool result output — hover reveals Copy button (top-right) on tool result pre blocks, copies raw output to clipboard with Copied\! feedback; mobile: always-visible at 0.6 opacity (90 tests pass)

item.title: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message c
item.description: Add recent sessions quick-access cards to empty state — shows top 3 non-autoweb sessions with title, time, and message count for fast navigation when no session is selected (89 tests pass)

item.title: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor
item.description: Add session right-click context menu — star/unstar, copy session ID, export Markdown, mark as read; positioned at cursor, closes on click-outside/Escape (88 tests pass)

item.title: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions l
item.description: Sticky date separators in message list — date headers (Today/Yesterday/Mar 15) pin to top when scrolling long sessions like Slack/WhatsApp, with pill-shaped label and solid background (87 tests pass)

item.title: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with
item.description: Add export session as Markdown — command palette entry (Ctrl+K > Export) fetches all messages, formats as Markdown with user/assistant headings and tool call blocks, triggers .md file download (86 tests pass)

item.title: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, h
item.description: Add tool call duration display — shows elapsed time (1.2s/5s/1m 23s) on tool result headers during live SSE streaming, hidden for batch history loads (84 tests pass)

item.title: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result
item.description: Add pulsing gold running dot on tool call headers — dot appears when tool_use is rendered, auto-removed when tool_result arrives via tool_use_id matching, cleared on history load (83 tests pass)

item.title: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/mai
item.description: Shorten file paths in tool call headers — shortenFilePath() strips /home/*/... prefixes to show meaningful tail (src/main.rs instead of /home/feather-dev/feather-dev/src/main.rs) in Read/Write/Edit/Grep previews (82 tests pass)

item.title: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges b
item.description: Add file language badges (Rust, JS, Python, etc.) to Read/Write/Edit/Grep/Glob tool call headers — colored pill badges based on file extension for quick scanning (81 tests pass)

item.title: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expand
item.description: Thinking block collapsed preview — shows first 80 chars of thinking text + word count when collapsed, hidden when expanded; CSS + JS change with new test (80 tests pass)

item.title: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fe
item.description: Server-side pagination: backend 'before' param for reverse pagination + frontend limit=200 initial load, load-earlier fetches 50-message chunks from server (79 tests pass)

item.title: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping
item.description: Fix SSE reconnect race condition — added tailReconnectTimer guard so onerror/heartbeat timeout cannot spawn overlapping reconnection attempts (MEDIUM priority from known issues)

item.title: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handler
item.description: Add session ID validation to API endpoints — is_valid_session_id() rejects path traversal and malformed IDs in 6 handlers (Phil priority: reject malformed IDs early)
